title: CLINICAL EVALUATION OF ROLE OF ANTIPLATELET THERAPY ON BLEEDING AFTER DENTAL EXTRACTION.
author: Dr. ANIKET SARKAR
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Planning for dental extraction for patients under antiplatelet therapy remains controversial. Still now there is no such agreed protocol regarding the modification of antiplatelet treatment in different doses for patients requiring dental extraction.
steps_raw: Planning for dental extraction for patients under antiplatelet therapy remains controversial. Still now there is no such agreed protocol regarding the modification of antiplatelet treatment in different doses for patients requiring dental extraction.
keywords: Dual antiplatelet therapy, Single antiplatelet therapy, Bleeding, Dental extraction.
